name: Vidalia Sweet Onion Chicken Breast Casserole
recipeIngredient: -1 can (10 3/4-oz) cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken breast in oil until cooked through.
2. Drain on paper towel.
3. Oil a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
4. Layer potatoes at the bottom of the dish.
5. Add a layer of sliced onions over the potatoes.
6. Spread mushroom soup evenly over the onions.
7. Gently place the chicken breast over the soup and sprinkle with paprika.
8. Cover tightly and bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
Yield: 2 servings
